message:
perf(widgets): add #[inline] to more widget accessors (bd-2qytc)

Annotate additional trivial accessors with #[inline]:
- Badge::width, TextInput::cursor, TextInput::focused
- Layout::len, Layout::is_empty
- LogViewer::len, LogViewer::is_empty
- NotificationQueue::is_empty
